title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Support interchangeable storage, notification, pricing, and item-policy implementations. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a protocol-driven circulation application and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.
Define abstract base classes with required operations and optional shared behavior when nominal hierarchy is justified.
Define structural Protocol roles that match consumer needs and support static checking without forced inheritance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
